inputs.label: Average Blood Glucose
inputs.businessContext: Average blood glucose level over the past 2-3 months.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average blood glucose level over the past 2-3 months.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Son 2-3 aydaki ortalama kan şekeri seviyesi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau moyen de glucose sanguin au cours des 2-3 derniers mois.
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel promedio de glucosa en sangre durante los últimos 2-3 meses.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط مستوى سكر الدم خلال آخر 2-3 أشهر.

inputs.label: Glucose Unit
inputs.businessContext: Select the unit: 0 for mg/dL, 1 for mmol/L.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select the unit: 0 for mg/dL, 1 for mmol/L.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birimi seçin: mg/dL için 0, mmol/L için 1.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wählen Sie die Einheit: 0 für mg/dL, 1 für mmol/L.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sélectionnez l'unité : 0 pour mg/dL, 1 pour mmol/L.
businessContext_i18n.es: Seleccione la unidad: 0 para mg/dL, 1 para mmol/L.
businessContext_i18n.ar: اختر الوحدة: 0 لـ mg/dL، 1 لـ mmol/L.

inputs.label: Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level for uncertainty range calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Confidence level for uncertainty range calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Belirsizlik aralığı hesaplaması için güven düzeyi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Konfidenzniveau für die Berechnung des Unsicherheitsbereichs.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de confiance pour le calcul de la plage d'incertitude.
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de confianza para el cálculo del rango de incertidumbre.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مستوى الثقة لحساب نطاق عدم اليقين.

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty
inputs.businessContext: Typical measurement uncertainty of HbA1c assay method.

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical measurement uncertainty of HbA1c assay method.
businessContext_i18n.tr: HbA1c test yönteminin tipik ölçüm belirsizliği.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Incertitude de mesure typique de la méthode de dosage de l'HbA1c.
businessContext_i18n.es: Incertidumbre típica de medición del método de ensayo de HbA1c.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدم اليقين النموذجي لقياس طريقة HbA1c.
